title: License + data-provenance snapshot capture in card flow
context: Each model card must record a snapshot of the license text and data-provenance page for both the model artifact and every dataset: a committed local copy, SHA-256 hash, and Wayback save URL. Without tooling, this is a manual and error-prone step in the card authoring flow. Depends on schema-001 and gate-003.
objective: Build and ship a snapshot capture utility that records and verifies committed license + provenance snapshots (local copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL) for model artifacts and datasets as part of the card authoring flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Utility captures a committed local copy of the license text/page and a Wayback save URL for both the model artifact and each dataset; snapshotRef records the committed path, SHA-256 hash, and Wayback timestamp.
A bare license URL is rejected as insufficient; the committed copy + SHA-256 hash + Wayback URL are all required for a valid snapshotRef.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; no credentials embedded in any committed file.
Tests include a golden snapshot fixture verified in CI.
resources: PLAN.md — License + data-provenance snapshot format (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL)
output: A merged PR adding a license + provenance snapshot capture utility with golden fixture tests and CI integration.
